Filesystem     1024-blocks      Used Available Capacity Mounted on
/dev/sda1         62914560  18204312  41203200      31% /
tmpfs              1013856       512   1013344       1% /dev/shm
/dev/sda2         10485760    102400  10240000       1% /var/log
overlay            1024000     12345    981234       2% /var/lib/docker
